scripts.test:fullstack:docker: bash -lc 'set -e; compose="docker compose -f test/fullstack/docker-compose.yml"; trap "$compose down" EXIT; $compose up --build --wait -d postgres mailcrab arkhamdb || { $compose logs arkhamdb-init; exit 1; }; $compose run --rm runner'
scripts.update-snapshots:docker: docker run -it --rm --ipc=host -v .:/work/ mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.60.0 /bin/bash -c 'cd /work && npm i && PW_TEST_HTML_REPORT_OPEN=never npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright.config.ts --update-snapshots'
